figures.caption: Figure 3: Needle-in-a-Haystack retrieval accuracy heatmaps for DeepSeek-V3.2 under three indexing strategies. The x-axis denotes context length (4K–128K) and the y-axis denotes needle depth (0%–100%). Darker shading indicates higher retrieval accuracy.

Figure 5: LongBench scores under different indexer configurations on DeepSeek-V2-Lite. All three HISA variants use mB = 8192 candidate tokens with varying block size B and block top-m. Block-Sparse uses B=128, m=16 (candidate pool = 2048, no token-level refinement). Token budget k=2048 throughout.
